review_method: re-invoked _UnlimitedOcrRunner.infer_pdf on each asset with production commit + pinned model revision; raw output captured to disk; classifications assigned per reviewer's fixed enum.

results.reviewer_reason: Absolute excess (32 chars) covered by a single well-formed markdown image tag; hidden-chars denominator (5) too small for ratio rule to be meaningful.

Bulk of output is legitimate extraction of file names visible in the PDF (.gitignore, .pre-commit-config.y, .readthedocs.yaml, CHANGELOG.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, CONTRIBUTORS.md, LICENSE, make_release.py, Makefile, pyproject.toml, README.md, .gitmodules). Isolated garbled header tokens (Sv rv edferv vr / Cacasc / Coacac) are minor decoder noise but do not constitute severe hallucination.
results.secondary_finding_details: 3 garbled non-English header tokens visible; short and localised; not corrupting semantic content of the document.

results.output_file_note: Inspection re-run killed at ~2h wall time after decisive classification evidence; the referenced .PARTIAL.md contains 995 model-emitted lines extracted from the streamed inference output before termination.
results.reviewer_reason: Decoder stuck in a loop emitting the LaTeX payload '\( \therefore m = \frac{3}{11} \)' with only the header bounding-box coordinates varying. 950 of 995 model-emitted lines are structurally identical. Baidu's no_repeat_ngram_size=35 guard is defeated because the varying bbox coordinates make each 35-token window formally distinct.
results.additional_finding_runtime_nondeterminis: Same input under identical config produced 1,048 s runtime on the first pass and >7,200 s on the inspection run (before kill). Runtime nondeterminism is very large in the pathological-loop case. Runtime equality is NOT a valid determinism criterion for the second pass.

determinism_criteria_recommendation.reason: Documented runtime variance up to 7x for the same input; VRAM peak also varies with decoder path taken.
